title: Pin a Board when logging in?
excerpt: I wanted to understand if there is a reason that when I log in each time it is directed to an old archived board and if there is a way that I can select which board it is “pinned” to at log in?

posts.author: alhaukaas (Alyssa)
posts.cookedHtml: I wanted to understand if there is a reason that when I log in each time it is directed to an old archived board and if there is a way that I can select which board it is “pinned” to at log in?

posts.author: Krishele (Krishele Guzman)
posts.cookedHtml: Is the page that you’re using to login bookmarked? If you put the URL as companyname.monday.com it should open up to your Inbox.
